summary: Completed backend testing for QR generation credits issues and commission distribution. All reported bugs have been verified as fixed.
passed_tests: POST /api/qr/generate with use_credits=5.50 returns credits_reserved in response
POST /api/tokens/purchase does NOT give credits to purchaser themselves
distribute_commissions only gives credits to referrers, not purchaser
QR generation correctly reserves credits and deducts from user balance
Commission distribution works correctly in referral chain
Authentication and session management working properly
Token purchase adds correct amount of tokens to purchaser
Referral system correctly applies and tracks relationships
